message:
test(readme): minor enum variant coverage (Asof / DuplicateKeep / ConcatJoin)

Self-review caught 5 enum variants across 3 enums with zero integration
test coverage:

- AsofDirection::Forward (nearest succeeding match)
- AsofDirection::Nearest (closest match in either direction)
- DuplicateKeep::Last (keep the last occurrence)
- DuplicateKeep::None (drop ALL rows that had duplicates)
- ConcatJoin::Outer (concat with outer index alignment)

Adds readme_minor_enum_variants_round_trip — reachable via prelude
alone — that drives each variant against detectable behavior:

- Asof Forward / Nearest: trades at t=2,5,8 + quotes at t=1,4,7,10;
  each direction yields 3 trade rows
- DuplicateKeep::Last on 6-row frame with k duplicates → 3 unique
  keys with last value preserved (k=3 keeps "f")
- DuplicateKeep::None drops ALL duplicated rows → only k=1 (which
  appears once) survives → 1 row remains
- ConcatJoin::Outer on 2 frames with overlapping column "y" but
  disjoint x / z → 4-row result with all 3 columns present (nulls
  fill missing cells)

API discovery (corrected before commit): drop_duplicates expects
&[String] not &[&str] for the column-subset arg.

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.30.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
